summary: Minecraft 26.0 shipped the unobfuscated rewrite: the obfuscated 1.x codebase and its mapping ecosystems (SRG, intermediary, mojmap-on-obfuscated) ended here. Compiled 1.x references point at classes that no longer exist in any namespace, so no mechanical bridge across this step is possible — the documentation records the break instead
notableChanges: Entire runtime renamed and restructured; no 1:1 mapping published
Mods must be rebuilt against the 26.x sources to cross this boundary
